reason: Significant regulatory headwinds are building up, highlighted by a projected 700% increase in crypto-related sanctions evasion for 2025 by Chainalysis, alongside recent asset freezes and arrests related to illicit crypto activities. This will likely lead to increased governmental scrutiny and potential crackdowns, capping upside potential. Furthermore, a major miner selling 97% of its February production to fund an AI pivot suggests a shift in conviction and reduces organic buy pressure. While tokenization offers long-term positive opportunities for advisors, the immediate regulatory and market structure risks are elevated, warranting extreme caution and close monitoring.
headlines: U.S. judge freezes BlockFills assets in dispute over 70 bitcoin with creditor Dominion Capital
Son of U.S. government contractor, accused of stealing millions in seized crypto, arrested in France
Sanctions evasions using crypto increased by 700% in 2025: Chainalysis
CleanSpark sold 97% of February bitcoin production to fund AI pivot
Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization offers always-on global investment access
